mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_notification (notification_id, user_id, type, title, content, link_url, related_id) VALUES
(#{item.notificationId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.type}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.linkUrl}, #{item.relatedId})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM user_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY ctime DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE user_notification SET is_read = 1, read_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
